# Gcore Developer Tools


## MCP Server
- [gcore-mcp-server-overview](https://gcore.com/docs/developer-tools/mcp-server/gcore-mcp-server-overview.md)
- [install-and-configure-gcore-mcp-server](https://gcore.com/docs/developer-tools/mcp-server/install-and-configure-gcore-mcp-server.md)
- [connect-cursor-to-gcore-mcp-server](https://gcore.com/docs/developer-tools/mcp-server/connect-cursor-to-gcore-mcp-server.md)
- [connect-claude-code-to-gcore-mcp-server](https://gcore.com/docs/developer-tools/mcp-server/connect-claude-code-to-gcore-mcp-server.md)
- [gcore-mcp-server-available-products-and-tools](https://gcore.com/docs/developer-tools/mcp-server/gcore-mcp-server-available-products-and-tools.md)
- [filter-tools-with-gcore-tools](https://gcore.com/docs/developer-tools/mcp-server/filter-tools-with-gcore-tools.md)
- [test-tools-with-mcp-inspector](https://gcore.com/docs/developer-tools/mcp-server/test-tools-with-mcp-inspector.md)

## Terraform
- [Terraform](https://gcore.com/docs/developer-tools/terraform/manage-with-terraform.md): Install the Gcore Terraform provider, configure v0 and v2 authentication, and manage Cloud and CDN resources via infrastructure-as-code.
